Dear Customer,
Our corporate website www.federal.bank.in will undergo scheduled maintenance for about 4 hours from 03-Jan-2026 (Saturday) 09:00 PM (IST) to 04-01-2026 (Sunday) 01:00 A.M. (IST).
During this time, the website may be briefly unavailable.
We regret any inconvenience this may cause and appreciate your understanding.
Warm regards,
